revision.comment: make "empire" a more concise alias for that flag variant
transittion complete - sport parameter no longer used using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
[[WP:UNDO|Undid]] revision 141315255 by [[Special:Contributions/R-41|R-41]] ([[User talk:R-41|talk]]) - the swastika should be centered, i think
from 1935 on, the official flag was off centered

Changed the Nazi flag from the debated 1935 version to the 1933 version which was a common flag, the off-centred disk flag is actually debated, but it was for certain the Nazi merchant flag for ships.
I don't believe this one is being used
I don't believe this one is being used.
test new documentation scheme; also test for instances that use deprecated variant label
